summary: Iteration 113: Testing succession toggle opt-in/out feature and relationship inversion. Backend code verified correct. Frontend UI verified via screenshot. Account lockout prevented full E2E toggle testing.
passed_tests: PUT /api/beneficiaries/{id}/toggle-succession endpoint exists and requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
Backend toggle-succession code correctly toggles succession_order between null and next available (code review)
Backend toggle-succession re-indexes remaining chain when toggling OFF (code review)
Backend toggle-succession appends to end of chain when toggling ON (code review)
Backend reorder endpoint respects opted-out beneficiaries (succession_order=null) (code review)
RELATION_INVERSE mapping exists in estates.py with correct inversions (code review)
GET /api/beneficiary/family-connections uses inverted relation labels (code review)
Frontend: Succession Chain toggle visible on beneficiary card (verified via screenshot)
Frontend: Badge shows 'PRIMARY' for rank #0 (verified via screenshot)
Frontend: 'Rank #1 in hierarchy' text displayed under toggle (verified via screenshot)
Frontend: Switch component with data-testid='succession-toggle-{id}' present (code review)
Frontend: Badge with data-testid='succession-badge-{id}' shows conditional label (code review)

features_verified: Toggles succession_order between null and next available
Re-indexes remaining chain on toggle OFF
Skips opted-out beneficiaries when assigning succession_order
Succession badge with conditional label at lines 626-632
Switch component with data-testid at lines 730-734
'NOT IN SUCCESSION' vs rank label display logic

test_credentials.admin: info@carryon.us / Demo1234! (ACCOUNT LOCKED due to rate limiting during testing)

context_for_next_testing_agent: The succession toggle feature is implemented correctly. The admin account info@carryon.us is temporarily locked due to rate limiting from automated testing. Wait 15 minutes or use a different test account. The beneficiaries page shows succession toggle switches and badges correctly. Use benefactor role account (not admin) to test toggle endpoint as require_benefactor_role guard blocks admin users without is_also_benefactor flag.
notes: Account info@carryon.us got locked after multiple login attempts during automated testing
The toggle-succession endpoint requires benefactor role (not admin role)
Frontend screenshot showed succession UI working correctly before lockout
Pytest tests confirmed auth guards work (401 returned for unauthenticated requests)
